 {"id":"bd-2qg.3.2","title":"Implement encode/decode helpers for grapheme IDs + width bits","description":"Scope:
- Add helpers to encode a grapheme reference into u32 with high-bit + width bits + 24-bit ID, and to decode back into (id, width).

Acceptance criteria:
- Tests for round-trip encode/decode and invalid widths/IDs; documented bit layout constants.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:37:52.201242563Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T00:45:15.066706490Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2qg.3.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2qg.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:37:52.201242563Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2qg.3.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2qg.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:45:15.066063809Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-2qg.3.3","title":"Pool API surface + safety invariants (docs/tests)","description":"Scope:
- Provide public API functions/methods and document invariants (id 0 invalid, refcount semantics, width range).
- Add tests for invalid ID access and decref to zero (slot reuse).

Acceptance criteria:
- API + doc comments align with spec and can be used by buffer/renderer without ambiguity.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:37:58.381616305Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T00:45:19.979125957Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2qg.3.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2qg.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:37:58.381616305Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2qg.3.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2qg.3.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:45:19.978184984Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-2qg.4","title":"Integrate GraphemePool into Cell/Buffer/Renderer hot paths","description":"Replace Arc<str> grapheme storage with grapheme pool IDs per spec. Update CellContent (and/or internal representation) to carry encoded u32 with high-bit marker + width bits + pool ID. Update buffer::draw_text and width handling so multi‑codepoint graphemes allocate pool entries, set continuation cells, and preserve zero‑alloc in hot loops. Update AnsiWriter/Renderer path to resolve grapheme IDs back to UTF‑8 when emitting. Include migration notes for any public API changes and ensure LinkPool usage is unaffected.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:02:21.018233080Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T00:42:20.517274041Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2qg.4","depends_on_id":"bd-2qg","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:02:21.018233080Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2qg.4","depends_on_id":"bd-2qg.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:04:05.162903927Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":5,"issue_id":"bd-2qg.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Purpose: wire the pool into the rendering hot path without regressions.
This includes Cell representation, draw_text/draw_char, and AnsiWriter emission.
Success means grapheme clusters render identically to legacy with proper width/continuations and no extra allocations.","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:42:20Z"}]}
-{"id":"bd-2qg.4.1","title":"Update Cell/CellContent representation for grapheme IDs","description":"Scope:
- Replace Arc<str> grapheme storage with encoded u32 grapheme references per spec.

Considerations:
- Maintain Eq/PartialEq for diffing.
- Ensure continuation cells still represent width>1.
- Update any public API constructors (Cell::from_grapheme).

Acceptance criteria:
- Cell/CellContent updated with minimal API breakage and clear conversion path from &str to pool ID.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:38:06.822537948Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T00:38:06.822537948Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2qg.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-2qg.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:38:06.822537948Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
+{"id":"bd-2qg.4.1","title":"Update Cell/CellContent representation for grapheme IDs","description":"Scope:
- Replace Arc<str> grapheme storage with encoded u32 grapheme references per spec.

Considerations:
- Maintain Eq/PartialEq for diffing.
- Ensure continuation cells still represent width>1.
- Update any public API constructors (Cell::from_grapheme).

Acceptance criteria:
- Cell/CellContent updated with minimal API breakage and clear conversion path from &str to pool ID.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:38:06.822537948Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T02:49:17.742467931Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2qg.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-2qg.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:38:06.822537948Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-2qg.4.2","title":"Update buffer draw_text/draw_char to allocate grapheme IDs","description":"Scope:
- Modify text drawing to use grapheme pool allocation for multi-codepoint clusters and width bits.

Acceptance criteria:
- draw_text properly handles Unicode grapheme clusters, wide chars, and continuation cells using encoded IDs.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:38:14.729431006Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T00:45:26.948240117Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2qg.4.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2qg.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:38:14.729431006Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2qg.4.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2qg.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:45:26.947486828Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-2qg.4.3","title":"Update AnsiWriter rendering path to resolve grapheme IDs","description":"Scope:
- Resolve encoded grapheme IDs back to UTF-8 at render time.
- Ensure width=2 graphemes do not emit continuation cells.

Acceptance criteria:
- Output matches legacy expectations for emojis/ZWJ sequences and respects sync-output/diff logic.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:38:21.117688440Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T00:45:32.938027292Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2qg.4.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2qg.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:38:21.117688440Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2qg.4.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2qg.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:45:32.937311564Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-2qg.4.4","title":"Plumb GraphemePool ownership through Renderer/Buffer","description":"Scope:
- Decide where the pool instance lives (Renderer, OptimizedBuffer, or global) and pass references without extra allocations.

- Buffer text drawing and renderer output can access the same pool safely; no lifetime leaks; no shared mutable aliasing violations.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:38:27.660947225Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T00:45:37.522350609Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2qg.4.4","depends_on_id":"bd-2qg.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:38:27.660947225Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2qg.4.4","depends_on_id":"bd-2qg.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:45:37.521736382Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"bd-2qg.6.3","title":"Conformance fixtures: hyperlink/link-id packing cases","description":"Scope:

-{"id":"bd-2qg.7","title":"Align TextAttributes with Zig spec link-id packing (bits 8–31)","description":"Spec requires link IDs packed into TextAttributes (lower 8 bits flags, upper 24 bits link ID). Document API impacts and migration path; add tests for set/get link ID preserving flags.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:02:44.135107544Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T00:42:42.059883852Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2qg.7","depends_on_id":"bd-2qg","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:02:44.135107544Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2qg.7","depends_on_id":"bd-2qg.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:04:28.459058443Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":8,"issue_id":"bd-2qg.7","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Purpose: bring TextAttributes in line with Zig spec by packing link IDs into bits 8–31.

 {"id":"bd-2qg.8","title":"Threaded renderer design (API, ownership, shutdown, sync-output)","description":"Design threaded rendering per Zig feature parity: define Rust API surface (e.g., Renderer::spawn or ThreadedRenderer wrapper), buffer ownership model (double buffer shared or message passing), and shutdown semantics. Consider Terminal !Send, sync output, cursor state, and drop/cleanup guarantees. Include reasoning about performance vs complexity and how to preserve zero‑alloc hot path.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:02:50.146469141Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T00:42:50.209440637Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2qg.8","depends_on_id":"bd-2qg","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:02:50.146469141Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2qg.8","depends_on_id":"bd-2qg.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:04:33.719649863Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":9,"issue_id":"bd-2qg.8","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Purpose: design a threaded renderer that preserves terminal safety and performance.
The design must handle ownership, diffing, sync-output, and clean shutdown without leaving terminal in a bad state.
This bead produces the blueprint used by implementation.","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:42:50Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-2qg.8.1","title":"Threaded renderer API sketch + command protocol","description":"Scope:
- Define exact API (constructor, present/submit, resize, cursor, title, shutdown).
- Define message protocol between main thread and render thread (commands, buffer ownership).

Acceptance criteria:
- API + protocol diagram documented; ready for implementation.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:39:30.519289239Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T00:39:30.519289239Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2qg.8.1","depends_on_id":"bd-2qg.8","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:39:30.519289239Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-2qg.8.2","title":"Thread lifecycle + cleanup semantics","description":"Scope:
- Define drop behavior, graceful shutdown, and terminal state restoration on thread exit or panic.
- Ensure raw mode / alt screen are always cleaned up.

Acceptance criteria:
- Lifecycle documented and verified by tests or reasoning; no orphaned terminal state.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:39:38.071785644Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T00:46:00.836732302Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2qg.8.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2qg.8","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:39:38.071785644Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2qg.8.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2qg.8.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:46:00.836044847Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 
 > Tracks implementation status of the Rust port against the Zig specification.
 
-**Last Updated:** 2026-01-19
+**Last Updated:** 2026-01-25
 **Test Status:** 328/328 tests passing (248 unit + 72 conformance + 3 e2e + 5 benchmarks)
 **Clippy Status:** 0 errors (format suggestions only)
 **Estimated Completion:** ~97%
@@ -31,9 +31,9 @@
 | Feature | Status | Notes |
 |---------|--------|-------|
 | RGBA Color | ✅ | f32 components, alpha blending, HSV conversion |
-| Text Attributes | ✅ | bitflags u8: bold, dim, italic, underline, blink, inverse, hidden, strikethrough |
+| Text Attributes | ✅ | bitflags u32: flags in bits 0-7, link ID in bits 8-31 |
 | Cell | ✅ | CellContent enum: Char, Grapheme (Arc<str>), Empty, Continuation |
-| Style | ✅ | fg, bg, attributes with builder pattern |
+| Style | ✅ | fg, bg, attributes (packed link ID) with builder pattern |
 
 ---

@@ -6,6 +6,12 @@
 
 - **Updated:** 1  |  **Already Latest:** 3  |  **Failed:** 0  |  **Needs Attention:** 0
 
+## API Changes (2026-01-25)
+
+- **TextAttributes:** now `u32` with link ID packed into bits 8-31 (flags remain bits 0-7).
+- **Style:** removed `link_id` field; use `Style::with_link()` or `TextAttributes::with_link_id()`.
+- **Cell/Renderer/AnsiWriter:** hyperlink handling now reads link IDs from packed attributes.
+
 ## Current Versions (Already at Latest)
 
 ### bitflags: 2.10.0
